resources.string: Because this app was installed outside the Play Store, Android requires you to manually allow restricted settings before notification access can be granted.
1. Tap the button below to open App Settings\n2. Tap the three-dot menu (⋮) at the top right\n3. Select \"Allow restricted settings\"
PandoraRemote needs Notification Access to read Pandora\'s playback notifications. This is how we detect the current song, artist, and station to display on your Pebble watch.
1. Tap the button below\n2. Find \"PandoraRemote\" in the list\n3. Toggle it on
Privacy: This app collects no data. Notification content is only used locally to forward song information to your Pebble watch. Nothing is stored, shared, or sent to any server.

PandoraRemote Companion
by Marc Passy

Version %s

PandoraRemote lets you control Pandora Internet Radio from your Pebble smartwatch. Skip tracks, thumbs up or down, pause and play — all from your wrist.

The companion app bridges Pandora's Android notifications to your Pebble, forwarding song info and relaying your commands back.

No data is collected, stored, or transmitted to any server.

Pandora, the Pandora logo, and related marks are trademarks of Pandora Media, LLC. This app is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Pandora.
